messages.description: first element names an object, rest is sent to that object in the sub-process
signal input if there's a corresponding adc~ input
signal input if there's a corresponding adc~ input
messages from sub-process sent via "stdout" objects
signal output if there's a corresponding dac~ output

flags.name: -ninsig <float>
flags.description:
sets number of input audio channels
default: 2

flags.name: -noutsig <float>
flags.description:
sets number of output audio channels
default: 2

flags.name: -sr <float>
flags.description:
sets sample rate of subprocess
default: pd's current

flags.name: -fifo <float>
flags.description:
sets number of blocks for round-trip
default: 5

flags.name: -pddir <symbol>
flags.description: sets Pd's directory (needed if different than default)

flags.name: -scheddir <symbol>
flags.description: sets scheduler's directory (also needed if different)

methods.description: start a new sub-process. This message takes startup flags and needs a pd file to open
